name: Festive Fruit Salad with Lemon Yogurt Dressin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the lemon yogurt, lemon juice, and honey. Mix well.
2. Cover and refrigerate to allow the flavors to blend.
3. In a large bowl, combine the kiwifruit, cubed cantaloupe, and sliced strawberries. Toss gently.
4. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
5. Just before serving, add the sliced banana.
6. Serve each 2/3 cup portion of the fruit mixture with 2 tablespoons of dressing.
